items.title: Fery last Briton standing in Wimbledon singles
items.summary: Arthur Fery is the last British player standing in the Wimbledon singles after his compatriots Katie Swan, Jacob Fearnley, and Jan Choinski are beaten.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Sciver-Brunt leads superb England into World Cup final
items.summary: England roar into Sunday's T20 World Cup final against Australia with a superb 40-run victory against South Africa at The Oval.
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
